title: cyclophorus distichocarpus
intro: Cyclophorus distichocarpus, also known as the spotted cyclophorus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclophoraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Cyclophorus distichocarpus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Cyclophorus distichocarpus are often made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures and infusions.
